metadata.description: PowerShell code intelligence (PowerShell Editor Services) for Claude Code -- standalone distribution of the powershell-lsp plugin.

plugins.name: powershell-lsp
plugins.description: PowerShell diagnostics and PSScriptAnalyzer fix suggestions as Claude edits .ps1/.psm1/.psd1 files, via PowerShell Editor Services. Hover, go-to-definition, and find-references are on the roadmap, pending Claude Code plugin LSP-server registration (#66987).
